# boo-x402-mcp

MCP server giving AI agents pay-per-call access to crypto/web3 ground-truth data across 5 chains: Ethereum, BNB Chain, Base, Solana, and Robinhood Chain (chain_id 4663).

Paid in USDC on Base via x402. No API key, no signup, no subscription. Private key stays on the agent's machine (non-custodial). Built-in spend caps.

Install: npx -y boo-x402-mcp
npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/boo-x402-mcp
MCP Registry: io.github.lucle87/boo-x402-mcp

## Free tools (no wallet needed)

- x402_list_paid_tools: list every paid tool with its price. Call this first.
- x402_spend_status: how much has been spent this session, and the caps.

## Paid tools

### Safety (call before buying a token)
- token_rugcheck ($0.01) - GO/CAUTION/DANGER verdict. Chains: eth, bnb, base, solana, rhchain. Checks honeypot, buy/sell tax, mint authority, ownership, holder concentration.
- token_holders ($0.01) - top holder %, top-10 %, holder count. Chains: eth, bnb, base, solana, rhchain.
- contract_safety ($0.01) - proxy/upgradeable, owner privileges, unverified source. Chains: eth, bnb, base.
- wallet_risk ($0.01) - scam/phishing flags, age, activity for an address.
- wallet_sanctions ($0.01) - OFAC sanctions screen for an address.
- wallet_signal ($0.02) - composite SAFE/CAUTION/DANGER verdict for an address.
- solana_bundle_check ($0.015) - Solana only. Detects bundled/sniped token launches.

### Meme tokens
- meme_discover ($0.01) - trending / newly launched meme tokens. Chains: eth, bnb, base, solana.
- token_momentum ($0.01) - short-term price/volume momentum.
- meme_signal ($0.02) - composite BUY/HOLD/AVOID verdict.

### Token data
- token_price ($0.01) - price, liquidity, 24h volume, FDV, market cap from DEX pairs.
- token_supply ($0.01) - total supply, circulating supply, decimals.
- token_snapshot ($0.015) - price + supply + safety in one call.

### Market and DeFi
- fear_greed ($0.005) - Crypto Fear & Greed index. No input.
- gas_oracle ($0.005) - gas prices (slow/average/fast) on an EVM chain.
- ens_resolve ($0.005) - ENS name to address, or reverse.
- defi_tvl ($0.01) - TVL for a DeFi protocol.
- defi_yields ($0.01) - yield/farming opportunities.
- chain_tvl ($0.01) - TVL per blockchain.
- stablecoin_peg ($0.01) - stablecoin peg status, detects depegs.
- derivatives_funding ($0.01) - perp funding rates and open interest.
- trade_signal ($0.02) - composite trade signal for a major asset.

### Prediction markets
- prediction_markets ($0.008) - browse active markets.
- prediction_search ($0.005) - search markets by keyword.
- prediction_market ($0.008) - detail and implied forecast for one market.
- prediction_history ($0.008) - historical price series for an outcome.

### Robinhood Chain (new L2, not covered by other providers)
- rhchain_health ($0.005) - network health: block, block time, gas, tx counts.
- rhchain_wallet ($0.01) - wallet snapshot: balance, tx count, scam flags.
- rhchain_wallet_score ($0.01) - activity score 0-100 and tier.
- rhchain_token_screener ($0.008) - screen tokens incl. tokenized Stock Tokens.
- rhchain_token_detail ($0.008) - holders, supply, price, market cap.
- rhchain_tx ($0.005) - transaction lookup by hash.
- rhchain_trending ($0.008) - trending tokens by 24h volume.
- rhchain_burn ($0.005) - burned amount and % of supply.

## Payment

x402 on Base. USDC (0x833589fCD6eDb6E08f4c7C32D4f71b54bdA02913).
The wallet signs an EIP-3009 authorization locally per call. No ETH needed for gas.

## Spend caps

MAX_USD_PER_CALL (default 0.05) and MAX_USD_TOTAL (default 5) are enforced in code before the wallet signs.

## Data

Public, verifiable sources: Blockscout, RPC, DEX pairs, DefiLlama, GoPlus. Read-only. NOT investment advice.
